calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Agent Under Power Of Attorney For Order To Establish Special Needs Trust[Probate Code Sec. 4541(B)]
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with (petitioner) Katherine Lee. Kaiser Lee also present.

The Court addressed Mr. Lee stating that this is a petition that asks that accountings be waived, that there would be no review of the fees paid and no bond, that he would lose the court's ability to review and see what happened with the funds that are for his benefit, that without a bond there will be no insurance and confirmed that this has all been explained to Mr. Lee. Mr. Lee stated that he trusts his sister, that he has not thought of hiring independent counsel, that it is okay if she does not report to the court on fees that she pays herself or anyone else and that it is okay if there is no bond. The Court stated that these are things that exist in the law to protect you but if you don't want them the Court will waive them. The Court granted the petition by agent under power of attorney for order to establish special needs trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION Petition By Agent Under Power Of Attorney For Order To Establish Special Needs Trust[Probate Code Sec. 4541(B)]
